client.c(3) Library Functions Manual client.c(3)

NAME

client.c

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define WASM_LOG_USE_ERROR

Enumerations


enum connection_state_t { CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED = 0, CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING = 1, CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE = 2, CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED = 3, CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR = 4 }

Functions


EM_JS (void, js_debug_log,(const char *msg), { console.error('[WASM DEBUG]', UTF8ToString(msg));})
EM_JS (void, js_send_raw_packet,(const uint8_t *packet_data, size_t packet_len), { if(!Module.sendPacketCallback) { console.error('[WASM] sendPacketCallback not registered - cannot send packet');return;} const packetArray=new Uint8Array(HEAPU8.buffer, packet_data, packet_len);const packetCopy=new Uint8Array(packetArray);var pktType=packetCopy.length >=10 ?((packetCopy[8]<< 8)|packetCopy[9]) :-1;console.error('[WASM->JS] Sending raw packet:', packetCopy.length, 'bytes, type=0x'+pktType.toString(16));Module.sendPacketCallback(packetCopy);})
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_init_with_args (const char *args_json)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_cleanup (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_generate_keypair (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_set_server_address (const char *server_host, int server_port)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE char * client_get_public_key_hex (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_key_exchange_init (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_crypto_parameters (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_auth_challenge (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_handshake_complete (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_encrypt_packet (const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_len, uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_size, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_decrypt_packet (const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_len, uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_size, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE char * client_parse_packet (const uint8_t *raw_packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_serialize_packet (uint16_t packet_type, const uint8_t *payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id, uint8_t *output, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_send_video_frame (const uint8_t *rgba_data, int width, int height)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_get_connection_state (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_free_string (char *ptr)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_encoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels, int bitrate)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_decoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_encode (const int16_t *pcm_data, int frame_size, uint8_t *opus_data, int max_opus_bytes)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_decode (const uint8_t *opus_data, int opus_bytes, int16_t *pcm_data, int frame_size, int decode_fec)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_opus_encoder_cleanup (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_opus_decoder_cleanup (void)

126              {
127   CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED = 0,
128   CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING = 1,

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void client_cleanup (void )


Definition at line 206 of file src/web/client.c.


206                           {
207   WASM_LOG("=== client_cleanup CALLED ===");
208   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_initialized", g_initialized);
209   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_connection_state", g_connection_state);
210   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
211 
212   // Clean up crypto handshake context
213   crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
214   memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
215 
216   g_handshake_complete = false;
217   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
218   g_initialized = false;
219   options_state_destroy();
220   platform_destroy();
221 
222   WASM_LOG("=== client_cleanup COMPLETE ===");
223 }






References CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED,
    crypto_handshake_destroy(), options_state_destroy(),
    platform_destroy(), WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_decrypt_packet (const uint8_t * ciphertext, size_t
  ciphertext_len, uint8_t * plaintext, size_t plaintext_size, size_t *
  out_len)


Decrypt a ciphertext packet


Parameters


ciphertext Input ciphertext data


ciphertext_len Length of ciphertext


plaintext Output buffer (allocated by caller, must be at least
  ciphertext_len)


plaintext_size Size of plaintext buffer


out_len Output parameter for plaintext length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 653 of file src/web/client.c.


654                                            {
655   if (!g_handshake_complete) {
656     WASM_ERROR("Decryption requires completed handshake");
657     return -1;
658   }
659 
660   // Decrypt the packet using handshake context's crypto context
661   size_t plaintext_len = 0;
662   crypto_result_t result = crypto_decrypt(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx, ciphertext, ciphertext_len, plaintext,
663                                           plaintext_size, &plaintext_len);
664   if (result != CRYPTO_OK) {
665     WASM_ERROR("Decryption failed");
666     return -1;
667   }
668 
669   *out_len = plaintext_len;
670   return 0;
671 }






References crypto_decrypt(), CRYPTO_OK, and
    WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_encrypt_packet (const uint8_t * plaintext, size_t
  plaintext_len, uint8_t * ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_size, size_t *
  out_len)


Encrypt a plaintext packet


Parameters


plaintext Input plaintext data


plaintext_len Length of plaintext


ciphertext Output buffer (allocated by caller, must be at least
  plaintext_len + crypto_aead_overhead)


ciphertext_size Size of ciphertext buffer


out_len Output parameter for ciphertext length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 623 of file src/web/client.c.


624                                            {
625   if (!g_handshake_complete) {
626     WASM_ERROR("Encryption requires completed handshake");
627     return -1;
628   }
629 
630   // Encrypt the packet using handshake context's crypto context
631   size_t ciphertext_len = 0;
632   crypto_result_t result = crypto_encrypt(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx, plaintext, plaintext_len, ciphertext,
633                                           ciphertext_size, &ciphertext_len);
634   if (result != CRYPTO_OK) {
635     WASM_ERROR("Encryption failed");
636     return -1;
637   }
638 
639   *out_len = ciphertext_len;
640   return 0;
641 }






References crypto_encrypt(), CRYPTO_OK, and
    WASM_ERROR.

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_generate_keypair (void )


Generate client keypair for handshake


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 234 of file src/web/client.c.


234                                   {
235   WASM_LOG("=== client_generate_keypair CALLED ===");
236   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_initialized", g_initialized);
237   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state BEFORE", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
238 
239   if (!g_initialized) {
240     WASM_ERROR("Client not initialized");
241     return -1;
242   }
243 
244   // Reset handshake context if previously used (reconnection / React Strict Mode remount)
245   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
246     WASM_LOG("Destroying previous handshake context before re-init");
247     WASM_LOG_INT("  State before destroy", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
248     crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
249     WASM_LOG_INT("  State after destroy", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
250     memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
251     WASM_LOG_INT("  State after memset", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
252     g_handshake_complete = false;
253   }
254 
255   // Initialize crypto handshake context
256   WASM_LOG("Calling crypto_handshake_init...");
257   WASM_LOG_INT("  State before init", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
258   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_init("wasm-client", &g_crypto_handshake_ctx, false /* is_server */);
259   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
260     WASM_LOG_INT("crypto_handshake_init FAILED, result", result);
261     WASM_LOG_INT("  State after failed init", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
262     return -1;
263   }
264 
265   WASM_LOG("Keypair generated successfully");
266   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state AFTER init", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
267   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
268   return 0;
269 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED, crypto_handshake_destroy(),
    CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED, crypto_handshake_init(),
    WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.

  int client_get_connection_state (void )


Get current connection state

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * client_get_public_key_hex (void )


Get client public key as hex string


Returns


Allocated hex string (caller must free with
  client_free_string), or NULL on error


Definition at line 302 of file src/web/client.c.


302                                       {
303   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state == CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
304     WASM_ERROR("No crypto context (call client_generate_keypair first)");
305     return NULL;
306   }
307 
308   // Get public key from handshake context
309   const uint8_t *pubkey = g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx.public_key;
310   if (!pubkey) {
311     WASM_ERROR("Public key not available in crypto context");
312     return NULL;
313   }
314 
315   // Allocate buffer for hex string (32 bytes = 64 hex chars + null terminator)
316   char *hex_buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(65, char *);
317   if (!hex_buffer) {
318     WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate hex buffer");
319     return NULL;
320   }
321 
322   // Convert public key to hex
323   for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
324     snprintf(hex_buffer + (i * 2), 3, "%02x", pubkey[i]);
325   }
326   hex_buffer[64] = '\0';
327 
328   return hex_buffer;
329 }






References CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED, SAFE_MALLOC,
    and WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_auth_challenge (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_AUTH_CHALLENGE packet from server


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 493 of file src/web/client.c.


493                                                                            {
494   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_auth_challenge CALLED ===");
495   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
496   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
497 
498   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
499     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
500     return -1;
501   }
502 
503   // Extract packet type and payload
504   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
505     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
506     return -1;
507   }
508 
509   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
510   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
511   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
512   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
513 
514   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
515   WASM_LOG_INT("  payload_len", (int)payload_len);
516 
517   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
518   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
519   if (payload_len > 0) {
520     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
521     if (!payload) {
522       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
523       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
524       return -1;
525     }
526     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
527   }
528 
529   // Process auth challenge
530   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_client_auth_response(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport,
531                                                                    packet_type, payload, payload_len);
532 
533   WASM_LOG_INT("  auth_response result", result);
534 
535   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
536     WASM_ERROR("Failed to process AUTH_CHALLENGE");
537     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
538     return -1;
539   }
540 
541   WASM_LOG("=== AUTH_CHALLENGE processed successfully ===");
542   return 0;
543 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_client_auth_response(),
    packet_header_t::type, WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and
    WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_crypto_parameters (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_PARAMETERS packet from server Sets up the key size
    negotiation before KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 427 of file src/web/client.c.


427                                                                               {
428   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_crypto_parameters CALLED ===");
429   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
430   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state BEFORE", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
431 
432   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
433     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
434     return -1;
435   }
436 
437   // Extract packet type and payload
438   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
439     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
440     return -1;
441   }
442 
443   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
444   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
445   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
446   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
447 
448   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
449   WASM_LOG_INT("  payload_len", (int)payload_len);
450 
451   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool
452   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
453   if (payload_len > 0) {
454     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
455     if (!payload) {
456       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
457       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
458       return -1;
459     }
460     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
461   }
462 
463   // Process crypto parameters
464   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_set_parameters(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx,
465                                                               (const crypto_parameters_packet_t *)payload);
466 
467   WASM_LOG_INT("  result", result);
468   WASM_LOG_INT("  signature_size AFTER", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx.signature_size);
469   WASM_LOG_INT("  auth_public_key_size AFTER", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx.auth_public_key_size);
470 
471   // Free payload
472   if (payload) {
473     buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_len);
474   }
475 
476   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
477     WASM_ERROR("Failed to process CRYPTO_PARAMETERS");
478     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
479     return -1;
480   }
481 
482   WASM_LOG("=== CRYPTO_PARAMETERS processed successfully ===");
483   return 0;
484 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    buffer_pool_free(), CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_set_parameters(), packet_header_t::type,
    WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_handshake_complete (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_COMPLETE packet from server


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 552 of file src/web/client.c.


552                                                                                {
553   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_handshake_complete CALLED ===");
554   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
555   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
556 
557   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
558     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
559     return -1;
560   }
561 
562   // Extract packet type and payload
563   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
564     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
565     return -1;
566   }
567 
568   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
569   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
570   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
571   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
572 
573   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
574 
575   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
576   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
577   if (payload_len > 0) {
578     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
579     if (!payload) {
580       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
581       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
582       return -1;
583     }
584     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
585   }
586 
587   // Complete handshake (takes ownership of payload and will free it)
588   asciichat_error_t result =
589       crypto_handshake_client_complete(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport, packet_type, payload, payload_len);
590 
591   WASM_LOG_INT("  handshake_complete result", result);
592 
593   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
594     WASM_ERROR("Failed to complete handshake");
595     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
596     return -1;
597   }
598 
599   g_handshake_complete = true;
600   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED;
601 
602   // Update transport with the crypto context so ACIP can encrypt/decrypt packets
603   g_wasm_transport.crypto_ctx = &g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx;
604 
605   WASM_LOG("=== HANDSHAKE COMPLETE - session encrypted ===");
606   return 0;
607 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED, CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_client_complete(), packet_header_t::type,
    WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_key_exchange_init (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT packet from server This is the
    first step of the crypto handshake


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 339 of file src/web/client.c.


339                                                                               {
340   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_key_exchange_init CALLED ===");
341   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
342   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state BEFORE", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
343 
344   // Safety check: if handshake context is not in INIT state, reinitialize it
345   // This handles cases where previous handshakes weren't properly cleaned up
346   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_INIT) {
347     WASM_LOG("Handshake context not in INIT state, reinitializing...");
348     WASM_LOG_INT("  Previous state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
349 
350     // Destroy and reset
351     if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
352       crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
353     }
354     memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
355 
356     // Reinitialize to INIT state
357     asciichat_error_t init_result = crypto_handshake_init("wasm-client", &g_crypto_handshake_ctx, false);
358     if (init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
359       WASM_ERROR("Failed to reinitialize crypto handshake context");
360       WASM_LOG_INT("  init result", init_result);
361       return -1;
362     }
363     WASM_LOG("Crypto handshake context reinitialized");
364   }
365 
366   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
367     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
368     return -1;
369   }
370 
371   // Extract packet type and payload
372   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
373     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
374     return -1;
375   }
376 
377   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
378   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
379   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
380   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
381 
382   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
383   WASM_LOG_INT("  payload_len", (int)payload_len);
384 
385   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
386   // The raw packet pointer from JS cannot be passed directly because the crypto
387   // handshake function calls buffer_pool_free() on the payload when done.
388   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
389   if (payload_len > 0) {
390     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
391     if (!payload) {
392       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
393       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
394       return -1;
395     }
396     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
397   }
398 
399   // Process key exchange using transport-abstracted handshake
400   WASM_LOG("Calling crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange...");
401 
402   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport,
403                                                                   packet_type, payload, payload_len);
404 
405   WASM_LOG_INT("  handshake result", result);
406   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state AFTER", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
407 
408   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
409     WASM_ERROR("Failed to process KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT");
410     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
411     return -1;
412   }
413 
414   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE;
415   WASM_LOG("=== KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT processed successfully ===");
416   return 0;
417 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR, CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE,
    crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(),
    crypto_handshake_destroy(), CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED,
    CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_INIT, crypto_handshake_init(),
    packet_header_t::type, WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and
    WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_init_with_args (const char * args_json)


Initialize client mode with command-line style arguments


Parameters


args_json Space-separated string of argument
  strings, e.g. "client --width 80 --height 40"


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 146 of file src/web/client.c.


146                                                  {
147   WASM_LOG("client_init_with_args: START");
148 
149   // Parse space-separated arguments
150   WASM_LOG("Parsing arguments...");
151   char *args_copy = NULL;
152   char *argv[64] = {NULL};
153   int argc = wasm_parse_args(args_json, argv, 64, &args_copy);
154   if (argc < 0) {
155     WASM_ERROR("strdup FAILED");
156     return -1;
157   }
158   WASM_LOG_INT("Parsed arguments, argc", argc);
159 
160   // Initialize options (sets up RCU, defaults, etc.)
161   WASM_LOG("Calling options_init...");
162   asciichat_error_t err = options_init(argc, argv);
163   free(args_copy);
164 
165   if (g_initialized) {
166     WASM_ERROR("Client already initialized");
167     return -1;
168   }
169 
170   // Initialize platform layer
171   WASM_LOG("Calling platform_init...");
172   err = platform_init();
173   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
174     WASM_ERROR("platform_init FAILED");
175     return -1;
176   }
177   WASM_LOG("platform_init OK");
178 
179   // Initialize logging to stderr (console.error in browser)
180   WASM_LOG("Calling log_init...");
181   log_init(NULL, LOG_DEBUG, true, false);
182   // Use debug-style format in WASM so browser console shows full log headers
183   log_set_format(OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, false);
184   WASM_LOG("log_init OK");
185   log_info("WASM client initialized via logging system");
186 
187   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
188     WASM_LOG_INT("options_init FAILED", err);
189     return -1;
190   }
191   WASM_LOG("options_init OK");
192 
193   // Initialize ANSI color code generation
194   WASM_LOG("Calling ansi_fast_init...");
195   ansi_fast_init();
196   WASM_LOG("ansi_fast_init OK");
197 
198   g_initialized = true;
199   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
200 
201   WASM_LOG("client_init_with_args: COMPLETE");
202   return 0;
203 }






References ansi_fast_init(), ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED, LOG_DEBUG, log_info,
    log_init(), log_set_format(),
    OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, options_init(),
    platform_init(), WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG,
    WASM_LOG_INT, and wasm_parse_args().






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_decode (const uint8_t * opus_data, int opus_bytes,
  int16_t * pcm_data, int frame_size, int decode_fec)


Decode Opus audio to PCM


Parameters


opus_data Input Opus data


opus_bytes Length of Opus data


pcm_data Output buffer for PCM samples (Int16)


frame_size Maximum number of samples per channel


decode_fec Whether to use FEC


Returns


Number of samples decoded per channel, or -1 on
  error


Definition at line 890 of file src/web/client.c.


890                                                                                                                     {
891   if (!g_opus_decoder) {
892     WASM_ERROR("Opus decoder not initialized");
893     return -1;
894   }
895 
896   int decoded_samples = opus_decode(g_opus_decoder, opus_data, opus_bytes, pcm_data, frame_size, decode_fec);
897   if (decoded_samples < 0) {
898     WASM_ERROR("Opus decoding failed");
899     return -1;
900   }
901 
902   return decoded_samples;
903 }






References WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void client_opus_decoder_cleanup (void )


Cleanup Opus decoder


Definition at line 921 of file src/web/client.c.


921                                        {
922   if (g_opus_decoder) {
923     opus_decoder_destroy(g_opus_decoder);
924     g_opus_decoder = NULL;
925     WASM_LOG("Opus decoder cleaned up");
926   }
927 }






References WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_decoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels)


Initialize Opus decoder


Parameters


sample_rate Sample rate (8000, 16000, 24000, or
  48000)


channels Number of channels (1=mono, 2=stereo)


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 839 of file src/web/client.c.


839                                                             {
840   if (g_opus_decoder) {
841     opus_decoder_destroy(g_opus_decoder);
842     g_opus_decoder = NULL;
843   }
844 
845   int error;
846   g_opus_decoder = opus_decoder_create(sample_rate, channels, &error);
847   if (error != OPUS_OK || !g_opus_decoder) {
848     WASM_ERROR("Failed to create Opus decoder");
849     return -1;
850   }
851 
852   WASM_LOG("Opus decoder initialized");
853   return 0;
854 }






References WASM_ERROR, and WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_encode (const int16_t * pcm_data, int frame_size,
  uint8_t * opus_data, int max_opus_bytes)


Encode PCM audio to Opus


Parameters


pcm_data Input PCM data (Int16 samples)


frame_size Number of samples per channel


opus_data Output buffer for Opus data


max_opus_bytes Maximum size of output buffer


Returns


Number of bytes encoded, or -1 on error


Definition at line 865 of file src/web/client.c.


865                                                                                                         {
866   if (!g_opus_encoder) {
867     WASM_ERROR("Opus encoder not initialized");
868     return -1;
869   }
870 
871   int encoded_bytes = opus_encode(g_opus_encoder, pcm_data, frame_size, opus_data, max_opus_bytes);
872   if (encoded_bytes < 0) {
873     WASM_ERROR("Opus encoding failed");
874     return -1;
875   }
876 
877   return encoded_bytes;
878 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_encoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels, int
  bitrate)


Initialize Opus encoder


Parameters


sample_rate Sample rate (8000, 16000, 24000, or
  48000)


channels Number of channels (1=mono, 2=stereo)


bitrate Target bitrate in bits/sec


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 812 of file src/web/client.c.


812                                                                          {
813   if (g_opus_encoder) {
814     opus_encoder_destroy(g_opus_encoder);
815     g_opus_encoder = NULL;
816   }
817 
818   int error;
819   g_opus_encoder = opus_encoder_create(sample_rate, channels, OPUS_APPLICATION_VOIP, &error);
820   if (error != OPUS_OK || !g_opus_encoder) {
821     WASM_ERROR("Failed to create Opus encoder");
822     return -1;
823   }
824 
825   // Set bitrate
826   opus_encoder_ctl(g_opus_encoder, OPUS_SET_BITRATE(bitrate));
827 
828   WASM_LOG("Opus encoder initialized");
829   return 0;
830 }






References OPUS_APPLICATION_VOIP, WASM_ERROR, and
    WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * client_parse_packet (const uint8_t * raw_packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Parse a raw packet and return JSON metadata


Parameters


raw_packet Raw packet bytes including header


packet_len Length of raw packet


Returns


Allocated JSON string with packet metadata (caller must
  free), or NULL on error


Definition at line 680 of file src/web/client.c.


680                                                                         {
681   if (!raw_packet || packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
682     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
683     return NULL;
684   }
685 
686   // Parse packet header directly from bytes
687   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)raw_packet;
688 
689   // Validate magic number (convert from network byte order)
690   uint64_t magic = NET_TO_HOST_U64(header->magic);
691   if (magic != PACKET_MAGIC) {
692     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet magic number");
693     return NULL;
694   }
695 
696   // Convert header fields from network byte order
697   uint16_t type = NET_TO_HOST_U16(header->type);
698   uint32_t length = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->length);
699   uint32_t client_id = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->client_id);
700   uint32_t crc32 = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->crc32);
701 
702   // Build JSON response with packet metadata
703   char *json = SAFE_MALLOC(1024, char *);
704   if (!json) {
705     WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate JSON buffer");
706     return NULL;
707   }
708 
709   snprintf(json, 1024, "{\"type\":%u,\"length\":%u,\"client_id\":%u,\"crc32\":%u}", type, length, client_id, crc32);
710 
711   return json;
712 }






References packet_header_t::client_id,
    packet_header_t::crc32, packet_header_t::length,
    packet_header_t::magic, NET_TO_HOST_U16,
    NET_TO_HOST_U32, NET_TO_HOST_U64, PACKET_MAGIC,
    SAFE_MALLOC, packet_header_t::type, and WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_send_video_frame (const uint8_t * rgba_data, int width, int
  height)


Process a video frame and prepare it for sending


Parameters


rgba_data RGBA pixel data from canvas


width Frame width


height Frame height


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 762 of file src/web/client.c.


762                                                                              {
763   if (!g_initialized) {
764     WASM_ERROR("Client not initialized");
765     return -1;
766   }
767 
768   // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would:
769   // 1. Convert RGBA to target format (e.g., compress with libjpeg-turbo)
770   // 2. Build frame packet
771   // 3. Encrypt if handshake complete
772   // 4. Return serialized packet via callback to JS
773 
774   WASM_LOG("Video frame processing not yet implemented");
775   return 0;
776 }






References WASM_ERROR, and WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_serialize_packet (uint16_t packet_type, const uint8_t
  * payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id, uint8_t *
  output, size_t * out_len)


Serialize a packet structure to raw bytes


Parameters


packet_type Type of packet


payload Packet payload data


payload_len Length of payload


client_id Client ID to include in header


output Output buffer (allocated by caller)


out_len Output parameter for total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 725 of file src/web/client.c.


726                                                               {
727   if (!output || !out_len) {
728     WASM_ERROR("Invalid output parameters");
729     return -1;
730   }
731 
732   // Calculate CRC32 of payload (use software version for WASM)
733   uint32_t crc = payload && payload_len > 0 ? asciichat_crc32_sw(payload, payload_len) : 0;
734 
735   // Build packet header (convert to network byte order)
736   packet_header_t header = {.magic = HOST_TO_NET_U64(PACKET_MAGIC),
737                             .type = HOST_TO_NET_U16(packet_type),
738                             .length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)payload_len),
739                             .crc32 = HOST_TO_NET_U32(crc),
740                             .client_id = HOST_TO_NET_U32(client_id)};
741 
742   // Copy header to output
743   memcpy(output, &header, sizeof(packet_header_t));
744 
745   // Copy payload to output
746   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
747     memcpy(output + sizeof(packet_header_t), payload, payload_len);
748   }
749 
750   *out_len = sizeof(packet_header_t) + payload_len;
751   return 0;
752 }






References asciichat_crc32_sw(), HOST_TO_NET_U16,
    HOST_TO_NET_U32, HOST_TO_NET_U64, PACKET_MAGIC, and
    WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_set_server_address (const char * server_host, int
  server_port)


Set server address for known_hosts verification


Parameters


server_host Server hostname or IP address


server_port Server port number


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 278 of file src/web/client.c.


278                                                                         {
279   if (!g_initialized) {
280     WASM_ERROR("Client not initialized");
281     return -1;
282   }
283 
284   if (!server_host || server_port <= 0 || server_port > 65535) {
285     WASM_ERROR("Invalid server address parameters");
286     return -1;
287   }
288 
289   // Set server IP and port in handshake context
290   SAFE_STRNCPY(g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_ip, server_host, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_ip));
291   g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_port = server_port;
292 
293   WASM_LOG("Server address set");
294   return 0;
295 }






References SAFE_STRNCPY, WASM_ERROR, and
    WASM_LOG.






EM_JS
  (void , js_debug_log , (const char *msg) , { console.error('[WASM DEBUG]',
  UTF8ToString(msg));} )






EM_JS
  (void , js_send_raw_packet , (const uint8_t *packet_data, size_t
  packet_len) , { if(!Module.sendPacketCallback) { console.error('[WASM]
  sendPacketCallback not registered - cannot send packet');return;} const
  packetArray=new Uint8Array(HEAPU8.buffer, packet_data, packet_len);const
  packetCopy=new Uint8Array(packetArray);var pktType=packetCopy.length >=10
  ?((packetCopy[8]<< 8)|packetCopy[9]) :-1;console.error('[WASM->JS]
  Sending raw packet:', packetCopy.length, 'bytes,
  type=0x'+pktType.toString(16));Module.sendPacketCallback(packetCopy);}
  )








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.12
    ascii-chat
